privileged_info_summary: This task creates a 16-week course syllabus document for ENVS 410: Urban Ecology and Sustainability, taught by Dr. Samira Al-Rashid. The document must be created in Apache OpenOffice Writer from synthetic course data embedded in the task setup, saved as ENVS410_Syllabus_Fall2024.odt. The syllabus requires 8+ Heading 1 sections, 5+ Heading 2 subsections, a 16-row weekly schedule table, auto-generated table of contents, and page numbers. Required content includes: urban ecology, Portland State University, author references (Forman and Beatley for textbooks). One metadata discrepancy found: the metadata claims minimum file size of 8000 bytes, but the verifier only enforces 5000 bytes as the threshold for substantial content.
